name: Trey Clover(Concern)
description:
So one of two Trey bots, since the second one will have the same greeting. I wanted to try to have one romantic one and one platonic one, this one is the romantic one(as in Trey has romantic feelings for the user)

Also, I finally got all my lore on NRC together plus some of the lore for their homelands, so like how I did for my diasom bots, I will be adding homeland lore(I did the same for the tweels)
creator: D3C4Y1NG_Helena
